Description: Supervisor/QE evaluating: is this actually a problem?
Problem confirmed. DefectType, Severity, Familiarity assessed.
Reviewed and determined not to be a defect (record preserved for trending)
Notes: Terminal. Counts as false signal for metrics.

Description: Confirmed defect handled in place — known issue, minor severity, quick disposition recorded
Notes: Terminal. Counts as confirmed defect. Feeds accumulation.

Description: Promoted to NCR or Process Deviation for formal resolution
Suspect product quarantined, reaction plan active
Deviation resolved — product released or no product impact
Confirmed nonconforming product found — NCR created
